title: Andrea Recine
text:
About me
I am a PhD candidate in Economics at the Department of Economics and Law at Sapienza University of Rome.
My research focuses on Time Series Econometrics, Bayesian Econometrics and Applied Macroeconomics.
E-mail: andrea.recine@uniroma1.it
